Calm Technologies That Excite Me

These are some products that I'm excitedly following because they're technologies without the intent to dominate.

I believe that technology should be an enabler, not a subjugator. Technology should help you do a thing and then stand back as you hold the reins of your human experience.

The Daylight Computer

E-ink is very cool. It moves ink on the screen to change the picture and does not need extra power to maintain the state of that ink.

Restored/Modded iPods

The experience was calmer because my options were limited and I chose the albums wisely.

Footnotes

  1. Any compute or frontlight still uses power, but the display itself can retain images without power.

Abhigyan Trips

working towards a more distraction-free internet.
